datasets.name: Python Programming Language
datasets.text: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language created by Guido van Rossum in 1991. It emphasizes code readability and simplicity. Python supports multiple programming paradigms including object-oriented, procedural, and functional programming.

datasets.name: Docker Container Platform
datasets.text: Docker is a platform for containerization that allows you to package applications with all dependencies into isolated containers. Docker containers are lightweight and ensure consistent behavior across different environments.

datasets.name: REST API Architecture
datasets.text: REST API is an architectural style for web services using HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE. Responses are typically in JSON format. RESTful services should be stateless, meaning each request contains all necessary information.

datasets.name: Machine Learning Overview
datasets.text: Machine Learning is a subset of Artificial Intelligence that enables systems to learn from data without explicit programming. Types include supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and reinforcement learning.

datasets.name: Git Version Control System
datasets.text: Git is a distributed version control system for tracking changes in code. Basic commands include add, commit, push, pull, branch, and merge. Git allows multiple developers to work on the same project simultaneously.

datasets.name: SQL Databases
datasets.text: SQL (Structured Query Language) is used to manage relational databases. Common operations include SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE. SQL databases use tables with rows and columns to store data.

datasets.name: React JavaScript Library
datasets.text: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces developed by Facebook. It uses a component-based architecture and virtual DOM for efficient updates. React Hooks like useState and useEffect manage state and side effects.

datasets.name: FastAPI Web Framework
datasets.text: FastAPI is a modern web framework for building APIs with Python. It automatically generates OpenAPI documentation, supports async operations, and provides data validation through Pydantic.

datasets.name: Kubernetes Orchestration
datasets.text: Kubernetes is an open-source container orchestration platform that automates deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. It was originally developed by Google.

datasets.name: RAG - Retrieval-Augmented Generation
datasets.text: RAG is an approach to improve LLM responses by first retrieving relevant documents from a knowledge base, then providing them as context to the model. This reduces hallucinations and enables answering questions about specific data.
